citeinfo.origin: David Board, U.S. Forest Service - Rocky Mountain Research Station, Data Analyst
citeinfo.title: Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin - Watersheds

descript.abstract: Multiple research and management partners collaboratively developed a multiscale approach for assessing the geomorphic sensitivity of streams and ecological resilience of riparian and meadow ecosystems in upland watersheds of the Great Basin to disturbances and management actions. The approach builds on long-term work by the partners on the responses of these systems to disturbances and management actions. At the core of the assessments is information on past and present watershed and stream channel characteristics, geomorphic and hydrologic processes, and riparian and meadow vegetation. In this report, we describe the approach used to delineate Great Basin mountain ranges and the watersheds within them, and the data that are available for the individual watersheds. We also describe the resulting database and the data sources. Furthermore, we summarize information on the characteristics of the regions and watersheds within the regions and the implications of the assessments for geomorphic sensitivity and ecological resilience. The target audience for this multiscale approach is managers and stakeholders interested in assessing and adaptively managing Great Basin stream systems and riparian and meadow ecosystems. Anyone interested in delineating the mountain ranges and watersheds within the Great Basin or quantifying the characteristics of the watersheds will be interested in this report. For more information, visit: https://www.fs.usda.gov/research/treesearch/61573
descript.purpose: The Great Basin Montane Watersheds dataset is the result of research assessing the geomorphic sensitivity of streams and ecological resilience of riparian and meadow ecosystems in upland watersheds of the Great Basin to disturbances and management actions. The study area, the Great Basin of North America, includes portions of Nevada, Utah, California, Oregon, and Idaho. Nine feature classes are included, which provide the seven regions (1) and the mountain ranges (2) identified in the study area, streams within each watershed (3) along with the stream heads (4), longest stream (5), lowest drainage points (6), and the stream head that has the farthest stream distance from the pour point (7), and the valley bottom which is considered the area surrounding the stream that is less than 15 meters above the stream's elevation (8) for each watershed. Also included are the watershed boundaries (9) and additional watershed information related to climate, topography, and wildlife. For more information, visit: https://www.fs.usda.gov/rds/archive/Catalog/RDS-2020-0059

idinfo.useconst: The USDA Forest Service makes no warranty, expressed or implied, including the warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose, nor assumes any legal liability or responsibility for the accuracy, reliability, completeness or utility of these geospatial data, or for the improper or incorrect use of these geospatial data. These geospatial data and related maps or graphics are not legal documents and are not intended to be used as such. The data and maps may not be used to determine title, ownership, legal descriptions or boundaries, legal jurisdiction, or restrictions that may be in place on either public or private land. Natural hazards may or may not be depicted on the data and maps, and users should exercise due caution. The data are dynamic and may change over time. The user is responsible to verify the limitations of the geospatial data and to use the data accordingly.

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

idinfo.datacred: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L & Miller J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. (RMRS-GTR-419)

dataqual.logic: Topology has not been formally validated, but it has been visually checked by Tom Dilts and Dave Board. Mountain range mapping and watershed delineation was originally based on an automated method. Watershed pour points were checked by Jerry Miller and Mark Lord in January of 2019. Jerry and Mark made several suggested changes to the locations of pour points. As a result of these suggestions a team comprised of Dave Board, Anna Knight, Peter Weisberg, Tom Dilts, and Evan Thompson evaluated each and every pour point and moved the location if it did not appear to meet the criteria set out by Jerry and Mark. Tom Dilts and Dave Board evaluated each watershed to ensure that no duplicates existed. If duplicates existed the watersheds were merged. We also evaluated the location of watersheds to ensure that they were consistent with the mountain range and regions layers.
dataqual.complete: 1454 watersheds represent every single watershed with perennial water (as defined by the National Hydrography Dataset) in the Great Basin as defined in the report "Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin". The Great Basin includes the interior mountain ranges but excludes the Sierra Nevada, Wasatch and immediately adjacent ranges. It also excludes the mountain ranges in the southern (Mojave) hydrographic Great Basin, but includes mountain ranges that drain into the Snake River.

horizpa.horizpar: This dataset is derived from 1/3 arc-second Digital Elevation Models obtained from the U.S. Geological Survey National Elevation Dataset, which has (approximately 10 m) resolution, equating to roughly to a 1:24,000 horizontal resolution.

procstep.procdesc: Please see individual process steps detailed in the Data Quality section of https://www.fs.usda.gov/rds/archive/products/RDS-2020-0059/_metadata_RDS-2020-0059.html#Data_Quality_Information

enttyp.enttypd: Feature class: A collection of geograhic features with the same geometry type (such as point, line, or polygon), the same attributes, and the same spatial reference.

attr.attrdef: Percent of the watershed mapped as valley bottom based on a 15-meter Height Above Nearest Drainage
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Length of stream suitable for Lahontan native cutthroat trouts including Lahontan cutthroat trout (Oncorhynchus clarkii henshawi) in the watershed
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Number of unique perennial stream segments within the watershed based on the USGS National Hydrography Dataset
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Percentage area under a dimensionless curve produced as the ratio of h/H and a/A, where h= elevation, H= watershed relief, a= planimetric area above h, and A= planimetric watershed area
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Proportion of watershed area with sedimentary bedrock state geologic map compilation (SGMC) geodatabase of the conterminous United States
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Average probability of occurrence of Brewer's sparrow (Spizella breweri) ) based on Cushman et al. (2016)
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Proportion of precipitation that falls during monsoon season: 30-year mean July to September precipitation / annual precipitation based on PRISM climate normals
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Unique ID for each watershed that contains the region name
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attrdomv.udom: Textual and numeric field that serves as an identifier

attr.attrdef: Average probability of occurrence of pronghorn antelope (Antilocapra americana) based on Cushman et al. (2016)
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Percentage of private land within the watershed based on Bureau of Land Management state ownership GIS layers
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Latitude (WGS84) of the watershed centroid
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Average probability of occurrence of pygmy rabbit (Brachylagus idahoensis) based on Cushman et al. (2016)
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: ID for each watershed within the region
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Average probability of occurrence of monarch butterfly (Dilts et al. 2019)
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Average probability of occurrence of pinyon jay (Gymnorhinus cyanocephalus) based on Cushman et al. (2016)
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Watershed mean of pixel percent shrub cover based on the NLCD Shrub Cover Product
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Internal feature number.
attr.attrdefs: Esri

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Average probability of occurrence of juniper titmouse (Baeolophus ridgwayi) based on Cushman et al. (2016)
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Average probability of occurrence of Greater Sage-Grouse (Centrocercus urophasianus) based on Coates et al. (2016) within Nevada and California and Dohert et. Al (2011) in Idaho, Oregon, and Utah
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Count of the number of dams and diversions within the watershed based on the USGS National Hydrography Dataset
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Watersheds with known occurrences of Columbia spotted frog (Rana luteiventris) based on Funk et al. (2005)
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Perennial stream length / total stream length based on the USGS National Hydrography Dataset
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Average probability of occurrence of the sagebrush sparrow (Artemisiospiza nevadensi) and vesper sparrow (Pooecetes gramineus) based on Cushman et al. (2016)
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Proportion of watershed area with volcanic bedrock state geologic map compilation (SGMC) geodatabase of the conterminous United States
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Proportion of watershed area with intrusive bedrock state geologic map compilation (SGMC) geodatabase of the conterminous United States
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Average length of perennial stream segments within the watershed based on the USGS National Hydrography Dataset
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Watershed mean of pixel percent cover of provisional herbaceous vegetation based on the NLCD Shrub Cover Product
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: 30-year mean annual precipitation based on PRISM climate normals (1981 - 2010)
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Area of the watershed in square kilometers
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Estimate of stream power produced by watershed area * relief ratio
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Length of the watershed along the main channel
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Northing (UTM Zone 11 North NAD83) of the watershed pour point
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: (Maximum elevation – minimum elevation) * drainage density
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Longitude (WGS84) of the watershed centroid
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Area of the watershed in square meters
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Easting (UTM Zone 11 North NAD83) of the watershed pour point
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Proportion of watershed area with carbonate bedrock based on state geologic map compilation (SGMC) geodatabase of the conterminous United States
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Longitude (UTM Zone 11 North NAD83) of the watershed pour point
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Proportion of precipitation that is snow: 30-year mean snow precipitation / annual precipitation based on PRISM climate normals
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Local Vector Ruggedness Measure - Average terrain ruggedness based on the methodology of Sappington et al. (2007) with modifications in which the underlying smooth topography is removed
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Percent of the watershed with slope of less than 5° outside of valley bottoms
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Regions within the focal area, delineated on the basis of their distinct montane EPA level IV ecoregions.
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Northing (UTM Zone 11 North NAD83) of the watershed centroid
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Average elevation of the watershed
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

rdom.attrunit: meters above sea level North American Vertical Datum of 1988 (NAVD88)

attr.attrdef: Feature geometry.
attr.attrdefs: Esri

attr.attrdef: (Maximum elevation – minimum elevation) / watershed length
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Easting (UTM Zone 11 North NAD83) of the watershed centroid
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Area of the watershed in acres
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Latitude (UTM Zone 11 North NAD83) of the watershed pour point
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Cumulative proportional area of watershed burned between 1984 and 2017 based on a combination of GeoMAC and Monitoring Trends in Burn Severity datasets
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Total stream length / watershed area
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Density of roads within the watershed based on US Census Tiger Line Roads
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Average probability of occurrence of gray flycatcher (Empidonax wrightii) based on Cushman et al. (2016)
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Average probability of occurrence of mule deer (Odocoileus hemionus) across all seasons based on Cushman et al. (2016)
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Watershed mean of pixel percent tree canopy cover based on the NLCD Tree Cover Product
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

attr.attrdef: Area of the watershed in hectares
attr.attrdefs: Board, D.I., Dilts, T.E., Weisberg, P.J., Knight, A.C., Chambers, J.C., Lord, M.L., Miller, J.R. (2020) Characterizing Ecoregions and Montane Perennial Watersheds of the Great Basin. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Research Station General Technical Report (RMRS-GTR-419)

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

distinfo.distliab: The U.S. Forest Service makes no warranty, express or implied, nor assumes any liability or responsibility for the accuracy, reliability, completeness, or utility of these geospatial data or for the improper or incorrect use of those data. The data are dynamic and may change over time. The user is responsible for verifying the limitations of the geospatial data and for using the data accordingly.

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standard for Digital Geospatial Metadata
